creator: nrgmilk@gmail.com
text:
I using gnome2-2.20.2

I can via login prompt, can login via gdm.

but,No matter how the password of the screen lock tries, it is not attested.

Finally, X will be compulsorily ended with Ctrl+Alt+Bs. 

All were the same though it had tried with three machines.

How-To-Repeat: run screen lock (Ctrl+Alt+L) from user on gnome.
